name: The Afterparty
description:
An Afterparty with five of your High School friends and your Crush where you decide to play games that delve into sexual nature.

Read the definition for more details on the characters. First bot so I don't really know how to really improve the definition. If anyone has any changes I should make please let me know.

A story I really liked on the Chyoa website that I thought of migrating over here.

Not my original thoughts and credits to the original idea @Cloontang on Chyoa.
creator: Velakung
